notes: Scope bleed fix worked: eval 2 now passes all 6 assertions (including new assertion 6). The Req 4 finding is now framed as 'introduces a concern unrelated to the stated problem' — a genuine clarity/coherence issue — rather than 'no AC exists' (testability).

Eval 4 (passive-voice) still fails the confidence differentiation assertion in both configurations. This is a standing issue: grouping and per-instance confidence variation are in tension. The assertion reflects desired behaviour; the skill needs guidance on confidence assignment within grouped findings.
Eval 5 (clean-ticket): iteration-3 rates the Technical Notes fallback observation as low confidence (vs iteration-2's high). Better calibrated — a subtle implicit gap deserves low confidence.
Timing: iteration-3 with_skill averages 41.9s vs old_skill 66.9s (-25s). Token counts also lower (14895 vs 15385, -490). The outputs are more concise without quality loss.

Overall: with_skill 96% vs old_skill 92% (+4pp). The single remaining failure is the passive-voice confidence assertion, which is a structural tension in the grouping guidance rather than a lens boundary issue.
